message:
feat(replay): MCP tool schemas and dispatch for replay operations (ft-og6q6.6.3)

Add replay_mcp module with 6 MCP tool schemas (inspect, diff, regression,
artifact-list, artifact-add, artifact-retire), DispatchResult enum for
typed Ok/Error responses, and argument validation helpers. All schemas
enforce type=object, additionalProperties=false, and "replay" tag.

29 unit tests + 15 property-based tests (MC-1 through MC-15).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
